_template.name: OpenGRIS: Scientific Research (HPC Batch)
_template.description: Research institution HPC deployment with AWS HPC Batch worker management. Uses task graphs for parallel scientific workloads — simulations, genomics, climate modelling.
_template.author: CalmStudio Contributors

nodes.name: HPC Scheduler
nodes.description: OpenGRIS Scaler scheduler managing HPC batch job dispatch across AWS HPC queue workers

nodes.description: High-performance compute worker for scientific simulation tasks

nodes.name: AWS HPC Batch Manager
nodes.description: AWS HPC Batch worker manager — submits Scaler worker jobs to the HPC queue for elastically scaled high-performance compute

nodes.name: Research Object Store
nodes.description: Object storage for scientific task inputs (datasets, parameter files) and outputs (simulation results, analysis data)

nodes.name: Research Task Graph
nodes.description: Task graph orchestrator defining parallel execution topology for multi-stage scientific pipelines with configurable parallelism

relationships.description: Task graph submits parallel computation tasks to the scheduler based on the DAG topology

HPC worker receives simulation tasks and returns results to the scheduler
